nasb.text: And it will be, like people, like priest; So I will punish them for their ways And repay them for their deeds.

esv.text: And it shall be like people, like priest; I will punish them for their ways and repay them for their deeds.

cnv.text: 所以，祭司怎樣，人民也怎樣。 我必按他們的行為懲罰他們， 照他們的行為報應他們。

ccb.text: 将来，我的子民如何， 你们祭司也如何。 我要照你们的所作所为惩罚你们、报应你们，
